mapper.insert: insert into attractions (name, type, location, region_code, description, recommended_duration) values (#{name}, #{type}, #{location}, #{regionCode}, #{description}, #{recommendedDuration})
mapper.update: update attractions set name = #{name}, type = #{type}, location = #{location}, region_code = #{regionCode}, description = #{description}, recommended_duration = #{recommendedDuration} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, name, type, location, region_code, description, recommended_duration, created_at, updated_at from attractions
